content:
💡 SmartImage | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Finding the original source or similar instances of an image by leveraging a wide array of reverse image search engines.
✨ Key Features: • Supports multiple reverse image search engines (SauceNao, IQDB, Ascii2D, trace.moe, Google Images, TinEye, Yandex, Bing, etc.) • Provides both a Windows GUI and a cross-platform Rdx command-line tool • Allows searching via direct image links or files • Configurable search behavior and output • Context menu integration for Windows GUI
📖 Summary: SmartImage is a C# application that performs reverse image searches across multiple engines. It offers both a Windows GUI and a cross-platform command-line interface (Rdx) to help users find the source of an image.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
